400.title: Bad Request
400.description: The server could not process your request.

403.title: Forbidden
403.description: Sorry, you are forbidden from accessing this page.

404.title: Not Found
404.description: The URL you tried to visit couldn't be found or doesn't exist.

422.title: Rejected
422.description: Sorry, your request could not be processed.

500.title: Server Error
500.description: Whoops, something went wrong on our servers.

503.title: Service Unavailable
503.description: Sorry, we are doing some maintenance. Please check back soon.
